title: TB Green Premix Ex Taq II qPCR
description: Takara TB Green (SYBR-type) 25 uL qPCR (RR820): 30 sec 95 C hot-start, fast 2-step cycling, dissociation/melt curve.

ingredients.name: TB Green Premix Ex Taq II (Tli RNaseH Plus)

payload.notes: TB Green dye chemistry (Takara's SYBR-equivalent intercalator); run the dissociation/melt-curve stage to verify specificity (for example, on the LightCycler 480: 95 C 5 sec, 60 C 1 min, then ramp to 95 C at 0.11 C/sec with continuous acquisition). Fast 2-step protocol. Primers 0.4 uM each final (optimize 0.2-1.0 uM); keep the initial denaturation at 95 C 30 sec (longer heat treatment can reduce enzyme activity). Values shown are for the Bio-Rad CFX96 / Thermal Cycler Dice 25 uL setup (no ROX). On Applied Biosystems cyclers use a 20 uL reaction (10 uL premix, 0.8 uL each primer, 2 uL template, 6 uL water) plus ROX Reference Dye (0.4 uL of 50X): ROX Reference Dye II for QuantStudio 3/5 and 7500/7500 Fast, or ROX Reference Dye for StepOnePlus and 7300. The related TB Green Premix Ex Taq (RR420) uses an identical cycling profile but a 0.2 uM primer final concentration. Source: Takara TB Green Premix Ex Taq II (RR820A) product manual, https://www.takarabio.com/documents/User%20Manual/RR820A/RR820A_UM.pdf
